case_title: JORGE GONZALEZ VS. NEFTALI CANDELARIO RIVERA

docket_entries.description: ORDER DENYING DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO VACATE/CANCEL JUDGMENT

MINI MINUTES FOR APR-05-2017 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, DEFENDANT NEFTALI RIVERA'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DENIED. MR. RIVERA HAS NOT SHOWN COMPLIANCE WITH LABOR CODE 98(F) REQUIRING HIM TO FIRST SEEK RELIEF FROM THE LABOR COMMISSIONER. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, REPORTER: KELLEY DEYOUNG, CSR 6780 (KDEYOUNG@SFTC.ORG) (302/HEK)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-05-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT NEFTALI RIVERA'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT

Appearances: Jorge A. Pichardo, Jr. (707.428.3000) for defendant and moving party; Theresa Bichsel (415.486.2083) appearing for the Labor Commissioner.

Argued and the Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Denied. Mr. Rivera has not shown compliance with Labor Code 98(f) requiring him to first seek relief from the Labor Commissioner. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Kelley DeYoung, CSR 6780 (kdeyoung@sftc.org) (302/HEK)
